title: Theory of Computation - Minimal State Automata

questions.question:
How many states are there in a minimum state deterministic finite automaton accepting the language \( L = \{w \mid w \in \{0,1\}^*, \) number of 0's is divisible by 2 and number of 1's is divisible by 5, respectively \( \} \)?



Theory of Computation: ISRO CSE 2014 | Question: 12
